positive: A stylized, modern composition featuring an ethereal deer standing majestically in a dense forest grove. The deer should be depicted with clean, minimalist lines and a powerful silhouette. Surround it with highly detailed, stylized botanical elements like oversized ferns, delicate glowing mushrooms, and trailing moss, creating a sense of deep enchantment. The overall style should blend Nordic folklore aesthetics with modern graphic design, using bold, contrasting colors of deep indigo, forest green, burnt orange, and accented with subtle bioluminescent glows. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly graphic, ensuring the art translates cleanly and vibrantly onto fabric, with clear separation between elements and strong visual weight. Cinematic studio lighting, flat graphic depth, high contrast, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy lines, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, realism, photography, low contrast
